title: Vibrant Korean Almond Wrap
description: A citrusy, crumbly wrap that showcases Korean flavors with Szechuan peppercorns, steamed leaf wrappers, and raw-friendly crunch.
instructions: Steam the iceberg lettuce leaves in a copper pot at 100C for 30 seconds, then cool in ice water to keep crisp.
Combine ground almonds, shredded carrots, cilantro, green onion, sesame seeds, and ground Szechuan peppercorns in a bowl.
Whisk together lemon juice, soy sauce, and honey until smooth.
Pour the dressing over the almond mixture and toss until coated.
Lay a cooled lettuce leaf flat on a clean surface and spoon a generous amount of the almond filling onto the center.
Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling and roll tightly to form a wrap.
Arrange all wraps on a serving platter and drizzle with a thin line of extra dressing for garnish.
Serve immediately with a chilled soy‑sesame dipping sauce or enjoy raw.
